title: Options Flow Scraper
description: Scrape unusual options activity, full options chains, and ticker-level flow data from Barchart. Each run costs a flat $1.50 and returns a full snapshot of current market signals.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: What data to fetch. unusual-activity scans the whole market for high Vol/OI signals. options-chain fetches all contracts for specific tickers. ticker-flow fetches intraday order flow for specific tickers.
enumTitles: Options Chain — full chain for specific tickers
Ticker Flow — intraday flow for specific tickers

underlyingType.title: Underlying Asset Type
underlyingType.description: Filter by asset class. 'All' fetches stocks, ETFs, and indices in one run.

tickers.title: Tickers
tickers.description: Required for options-chain and ticker-flow modes. Enter one or more stock symbols e.g. AAPL, NVDA, SPY.

optionType.title: Option Type
optionType.description: Filter results to calls only, puts only, or both.

minVolumeOIRatio.title: Minimum Volume / Open Interest Ratio
minVolumeOIRatio.description: Only return contracts where today's volume is at least this multiple of open interest. Higher = stronger unusual signal. Barchart's own filter starts at 1.24. Default 1.5 returns cleaner signals.

minPremium.title: Minimum Total Premium ($)
minPremium.description: Only return contracts where total premium (lastPrice × volume × 100) is at least this value. Filters out low-dollar noise. Default $10,000.

expirationDate.title: Expiration Date (options-chain mode only)
expirationDate.description: Filter options chain to a specific expiry. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Leave blank to return all expiries.

maxResults.title: Max Results (advanced)
maxResults.description: Maximum records returned across all asset types. Default 1,000 covers all meaningful unusual activity — the tail beyond this is very low Vol/OI ratio noise. Raise to 5,000 if you need the full long tail. Results are ordered by Vol/OI ratio descending, so a lower maxResults gives you the strongest signals only.
